productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Black Wallet
description: Crafted from soft leather, this wallet from united colors of benetton is a fabulously stylish way to keep your money and cards safe and secure. With a smooth grain finish, this bi-fold wallet has an embossed brand name on the upper with a twill tape detailing, and lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use. Dimensions: 9.5 cm X 10.5 cm Soft leather for flexibility and durability, with a striped twill tape detailing on the upper Two main compartments with striped twill tape detailing on the divider Mesh flap on the left side with card holders Coin pouch on the right flap Card holders behind the flap and coin pouch Care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
